title: Dekton Stainless Steel Wallpaper Paint Stripping Decorators Tang Scraper 2"
features: High-Quality Stainless Steel Blade: Crafted from premium stainless steel for long-lasting sharpness and durability. The blade is designed to withstand the rigors of various tasks including filling cracks and repairing holes.

Hollow Ground Blade: Features a hollow ground design, which ensures a precise and smooth application. This design enhances the knife's ability to handle intricate work, making it ideal for detailed repairs and finishing touches.

Ergonomic Hardwood Handle: The handle is made from sturdy hardwood, providing a comfortable and secure grip during use. Its ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue and enhances control for more accurate application.

Full Tang Construction: The scrapper boasts a full tang construction, meaning the blade extends through the entire length of the handle. This design improves strength and balance, ensuring the knife performs effectively during demanding tasks.

Versatile Applications: Perfect for a range of tasks including filling cracks, scraping wallpaper, and repairing holes. This versatile tool is a must-have in any toolkit for both DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide Strong durable scraper ideal for tough scraping jobs around the home Stainless steel blade resists rust Double hollow-ground flex blades for perfect flex point and longer life Full tang Dekton 2” stiff scraper
